header: Accordion Feature Section for polished feature narrative
subheadline: Frames product value with strong hierarchy, modern media support, and scannable details for every viewport.

items.title: Value spotlight
items.content: Clean hierarchy, restrained borders, and direct actions make this accordion feature section easy to scan across desktop and mobile previews.

items.title: Workflow advantage
items.content: The seeded content keeps the component sleek, credible, and import-ready while staying inside the Desiderio shadcn design language.

items.title: Capability layer
items.content: A sharp, production-minded accordion feature section using shadcn-style rhythm, semantic tokens, and concise copy so product teams can show value with clean, scannable sections.

items.title: Product proof
items.content: Built to show the accordion feature section with real labels, compact spacing, modern imagery, and practical states instead of placeholder filler.
